Enter a whole number between 1 and 1000.
Select a staff member to reassign to.
When on and the business_rules module is present, claim submission is evaluated by the rule engine; otherwise the built-in light rule is used.
Use business rules for adjudication
Three-letter uppercase currency code used by the auto-approval limit.
Auto-approve currency
Automatically approve eligible submitted claims when all configured limits match.
Enable auto-approve
Maximum claimed total allowed for auto-approval.
Auto-approve max amount
Only auto-approve when every line is still in warranty.
Require in-warranty lines
Shape: { timezone, week: { mon:[{start,end}], ... }, holidays:[...] }. Leave empty to disable.
Business hours JSON
Prefills warranty months on new claim lines and estimates portal entitlement. Leave empty to disable.
Default warranty months
Shape: [{ atPct, action:'notify'|'reassign', toUserId? }]. Leave empty to disable.
Escalation tiers JSON
Notify or reassign a claim once its SLA has elapsed past a percentage threshold. Tiers apply in ascending order. Leave empty to disable.
Escalation tiers
Grades that automatically hold a claim on receiving.
Quarantine grades
Optional provider key for the return-label seam. Leave empty for manual entry only.
Return label provider
Percent of the SLA window elapsed before a claim is marked at risk.
SLA at-risk threshold
Target response window in hours, from 1 to 8760.
SLA hours
Stop the SLA clock when a claim waits on customer information.
Pause SLA while info is requested

warranty_claims.triage.reason.coreAccept: Core return lines should follow the core acceptance path before credit is finalized.

warranty_claims.triage.reason.lineReview: One or more lines require manual review before adjudication.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.lowPriorit: Claims awaiting triage should not remain low priority.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.missingWar: Purchase date or warranty term is missing.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.openAtLeas: The claim has been open for at least {hours} hours.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.outOfWarra: The line is out of warranty, but a non-warranty return can be credited with a restocking fee.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.outsideWar: The line is outside the computed warranty window.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.priorityCo: Current priority is consistent with age and SLA.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.riskSignal: Risk signals require inspection before replacement.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.slaDueSoon: The claim is within {hours} hours of its SLA due time.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.slaOverdue: The claim is past its SLA due time.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.unknownEli: Eligibility is unknown, so inspection is recommended before disposition.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.warrantyEx: Purchase date plus warranty term has expired.
warranty_claims.triage.reason.warrantySt: Purchase date plus warranty term is still valid.
